productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Emb Sneaker T-Shirts
description: CompositionHot pink  round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with an embroidered image  on the front and grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to play hard in this hot pink Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike. The bold embroidered doodle of the shoe on the front gives this tee a big dose of energy. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.
